title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd!
